title: tillandsia disticha
intro: Tillandsia disticha, also known as the Spanish moss or air plant, is a type of epiphyte that belongs to the bromeliad family, obtaining moisture and nutrients through its leaves rather than a traditional root system. Traditionally, Tillandsia disticha has been used for its medicinal properties, including treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting better sleep, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, Tillandsia disticha can be used as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
